hooks.commandWindows: python -c "import pathlib, runpy; cwd = pathlib.Path.cwd(); root = next((p for p in (cwd, *cwd.parents) if (p / '.codex/hooks/forseti_guard_codex_adapter.py').is_file()), None); assert root is not None, 'Forseti Codex guard adapter not found'; runpy.run_path(str(root / '.codex/hooks/forseti_guard_codex_adapter.py'), run_name='__main__')"
